---
species: "Unknown fleshy algal crust"
accepted_code: "UFAC"
alternate_codes: # "CODE" for single or ["CODE1", "CODE2"] for >1
diminutive: #"CODE" # uncomment and fill in if one exists
alternate_diminutives: # "CODE" for single or ["CODE1", "CODE2"] for >1
common_name: "Fleshy crust"
field_id_possible:
  - yes
description: "Any non-calareous encrusting algae" # make sure to fill this in!
image: '/header_images/unknown_fac.jpg'
categories:
  - brown algae
  - green algae
  - red algal crusts
  - unknown
sampling_programs:
    - keen_quad
    - keen_upc
    - bhi_quadrat
    - lsw_quad
    - lsw_microquad
habitat:
  - intertidal
  - subtidal
mobility:
  - sessile
sampling_region:
  - GOM
  - Virginian
catami_code: 
catami_version: "1.4"
worms_code: 
---

![](/header_images/unknown_fac.jpg)

PHOTO CREDIT: https://limpets.org/rocky-intertidal-monitoring/ri-species/

**Other images:** <!-- Other images with attribution -->
<br/>

**Distinguishing features:** Fleshy/spongey to the touch. Grows synonymous to rocks, can be bumpy or flat.
<br/>

**Easily confused species and differentiation:** URFC, UBFC, UGFC
<br/>

**Extended Description:** If you can't tell the color (usually an issue between brown and red crusts) use this code. Header image is an example, hard to delineate if it is a brown or red fleshy crust!

<!-- link to worms page -->
